synopsis: A picture drama released on the BD Box Set of Mahou Shoujo Lyrical Nanoha A's. Subaru, Teana, Vivio host a radio show promoting their own BD Box Sets. This episode is the continuation of the Iryou Shoujo Medical Shamal picture drama episode that was included on the Mahou Shoujo Lyrical Nanoha: The Movie 2nd A's BD release.

title: Balala Xiao Moxian: Caihong Xin Shi
titleRomaji: Balala Xiao Moxian: Caihong Xin Shi
titleNative: 巴啦啦小魔仙之彩虹心石
synonyms: Balala Little Magic Fairy: Rainbow Heart Stone
Balala The Fairies: Rainbow Heart Stone
synopsis: After the fairies defeated Gunala, the Evil Goddess, another crisis hit the Fairy Castle!! The magical energy of the world has been devoured by the evil wizards. The Rainbow Flower, the source of the magic power, is soon to wither, and this will destroy the world of Fairy Castle. Only finding the legendary Rainbow Heart Stone and letting it recollect all the essential energy can save the world. To solve this biggest crisis in the history of the Fairy Castle, Prince Youle, Xiaolan, and their new friend Xiaoqian, have to go back to the human world and reunite with Meiqi and Meixue to fight the evil again. (Source: Mahou Shoujo Wikia, edited)

title: Mahou Tsukai Chappy
titleNative: 魔法使いチャッピー
synopsis: Chappy's story is much like Mahou Tsukai Sally (Little Witch Sally). Chappy becoming sick of the old customs of her people, left the Land of Magic for the human world. Soon her family sees how much she has in the other realm that they decided to join her new home. Chappy is known for being the first witch to use a wand. Her special chant is "Abura Mahariku Maharita Kabura. Mahou Tsukai Chappy is the fifth magical girl anime in history. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: Sarutobi Ecchan
titleNative: さるとびエッちゃん
synopsis: A strange girl transfers to Mitsuba Elementary School. At first glance, she is a normal student. However, she is a great athlete, and can talk to animals. According to her, she is the 33rd descendant of the great ninja, Sarutobi Sasuke. Futhermore, her dog, Puku, can talk. Because she doesn’t live in any house, she spends a night at Miko-chan’s room. She is turned out of the room once. However, because they thank her for extinguishing the fire, they let her stay at their house. After that, she makes a name at school. (Source: AnimeNfo)

title: Mahoutsukai Sally 2
titleNative: 魔法使いサリー２
synopsis: Sally was a tomboy and mischievous witch girl. One day, she was attracted by an advertising balloon, and went to the department store. There she found girls of the same age, Sumire and Yoshiko, and she wanted to become friends with them. After she became good friends with them, she made up her mind to pretend to be a human and began to live in the town with her follower, Kabu. Then she began to know more important things than magic. (Source: AnimeNfo)

titleNative: 愛天使伝説 ウェディングピーチ
synopsis: Specials of Wedding Peach included as a bonus on LD/DVD Box set volumes. Omake 1 - Episode 10,526: Gomenne Yousuke no Maki. (第10,526回 ごめんねえよけけの巻) A preview of "Episode 10,527" appears at the end, however, this is just a teaser—it doesn't actually exist. Omake 2 - Final Episode: Ai Tenshi Sentai Saigo no Tatakai. (最終回 愛天使戦隊最後の戦い) The "Wedding Baseball Tournament" preview of which is shown at the end of the final episode was also never released.

title: Himitsu no Akko-chan 3
titleNative: ひみつのアッコちゃん 第３期
synopsis: In the Kagami household, the old Western palm-sized mirror has been passed from from generations to generations. Akko-chan has been taught about the importance of the mirror and when she finally receives it from her mother, she cherishes it with all her might. One day, in the midst of a disturbance made by Taishou and his gang, Akko-chan accidentally broke the mirror. She made a grave and buried the broken pieces in the backyard. That night, Akko-chan was awakened by a flash of light and a kind voice which belongs to the Queen of the Mirror Kingdom. The Queen expresses her gratitude to Akko-chan for valuing the mirror so much and offers her a gift - a magical compact mirror. Whenever Akko-chan sings the magical words, she will transform into anything she wants. (Source: Anime News Network)

titleNative: 魔法のスターマジカルエミ 雲光る
synopsis: In this 15-minute short story, released more than 15 years after the finale of the popular Mahou no Star Magical Emi franchise, a new life was born into the Kazuki family. How did her baby brother change the family's life and what are Mai's feelings about him. At the end of an eventful day for the siblings and Shou, another concert is waiting for Emi.
